relationships.description: CWE-707 Improper Neutralization weaknesses (injection, XSS, path traversal) are mitigated by NIST SP 800-53 System and Information Integrity controls including input validation.
CWE-693 Protection Mechanism Failure weaknesses (missing auth, CSRF, default permissions) are mitigated by NIST SP 800-53 Access Control family.
CWE-693 Protection Mechanism Failure weaknesses (improper authentication) are mitigated by NIST SP 800-53 Identification and Authentication controls.
CWE-118 memory safety weaknesses (buffer overflow, out-of-bounds) are mitigated by NIST SP 800-53 System and Information Integrity controls including software assurance.
CWE-664 resource lifecycle weaknesses (use-after-free, deserialization) are mitigated by NIST SP 800-53 System and Information Integrity controls.
CWE weakness taxonomy informs NIST CSF Risk Assessment by providing a structured classification of software vulnerabilities for risk identification.
CWE-79 Cross-site Scripting is exploited by ATT&CK Drive-by Compromise. XSS vulnerabilities enable browser-based initial access attacks.
CWE-89 SQL Injection is exploited via ATT&CK Command and Scripting Interpreter techniques. Injection weaknesses enable arbitrary command execution.
CWE-78 OS Command Injection is exploited via ATT&CK Command and Scripting Interpreter. Command injection weaknesses enable system-level code execution.
CWE-287 Improper Authentication is exploited by ATT&CK Valid Accounts. Authentication weaknesses enable adversaries to use legitimate credentials.
CWE-798 Hard-coded Credentials is exploited by ATT&CK Valid Accounts. Hardcoded credentials provide adversaries with ready-made access.
CWE-862 Missing Authorization is exploited by ATT&CK Exploitation for Privilege Escalation. Missing authorization checks enable privilege escalation.
CWE-502 Deserialization of Untrusted Data is exploited by ATT&CK Exploitation for Client Execution. Insecure deserialization enables remote code execution.
CWE-918 Server-Side Request Forgery is exploited for ATT&CK Active Scanning of internal infrastructure via SSRF to map internal networks.
CWE-89 SQL Injection threatens GDPR Security of Processing requirements. Injection vulnerabilities can lead to unauthorized access to personal data.
CWE weakness taxonomy informs DORA Digital Operational Resilience Testing by identifying vulnerability classes to test for.
